principle: DAG/ready-set scheduling. Stage2 nodes 15, 16, and 17 are ingested as Stage3 roots. Nodes 18, 19, and 20 are Stage3 terminal deliverables.

15.name: stage2-real-image-source-ingest
15.role: Ingest Stage2 node-15 real-image acquisition output as a read-only Stage3 source.

16.name: stage2-existing-benchmark-source-ingest
16.role: Ingest Stage2 node-16 existing-benchmark acquisition output as a read-only Stage3 source.

17.name: stage2-simulator-gt-source-ingest
17.role: Ingest Stage2 node-17 simulator observations and privileged GT as a read-only Stage3 source.

21.name: real-image-unified-format
21.role: Convert real-image records into the Stage3 unified multimodal-record schema.

22.name: benchmark-unified-format
22.role: Convert existing benchmark records and official labels or QA into the Stage3 unified multimodal-record schema.

23.name: simulator-unified-format
23.role: Convert simulator observations, trajectories, poses, and privileged GT into the Stage3 unified multimodal-record schema.

24.name: real-image-data-juicer-cleaning
24.role: Run Data-Juicer-style quality filters on real-image unified records.

25.name: benchmark-data-juicer-cleaning
25.role: Run Data-Juicer-style deduplication, legality, metadata, and image/text filters on existing benchmark records.

26.name: simulator-data-juicer-cleaning
26.role: Run Data-Juicer-style sensor, trajectory, GT-completeness, and provenance filters on simulator records.

27.name: semi-supervised-tool-registry
27.role: Register semi-supervised annotation tools from BENCHCLAW_ROOT/annotation-tool with explicit output contracts.

18.name: real-image-semi-supervised-gt
18.role: Produce real-image records plus semi-supervised GT candidates with confidence, provenance, and audit reports.

19.name: benchmark-image-semi-supervised-gt
19.role: Produce existing-benchmark image records plus official labels and semi-supervised GT candidates.

20.name: simulator-clean-gt-pack
20.role: Produce cleaned simulator records plus privileged GT. No small-model annotation may override simulator GT.

forbidden_interpretations: Do not run 15->16->17->18->19->20 as a serial chain.
Do not make 18 depend on 19 or 20.
Do not make 19 depend on 18 or 20.
Do not make 20 depend on 18 or 19.
Do not let YOLOE, SAM3, or Depth Anything 3 overwrite simulator privileged GT in node 20.
Do not treat an LLM-generated description as ground truth.
